since_last: 32% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.42%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC +0.24% · Gold +0.94% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 32% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.42%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.42%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.91%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -14.05%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +5.04%, NVT +2.51%, ZS +2.16%, GEV +2.05%, ORCL +1.87%. Laggards: ISRG -14.05%, CRNC -7.47%, AMAT -6.88%, PUBM -6.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.32% at $124.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
